News & Updates

Follow the progress of the Knowledge Ark Initiative.

2026-03-08

Titanium Footprint: The Material Legacy of Civilization and the Archaeology of the Future

The archaeology of the Anthropocene introduces artifacts with unprecedented longevity into the planet's cultural layer — titanium items capable of preserving information for thousands of years.

2026-03-07

How ARKIVE Preserves Knowledge

Create articles in a convenient Markdown format using the Eleventy static site generator.

2026-03-07

Eternity in a Glass Cube

The Archaeology of the Future and the Phenomenon of Laser Engraving in Optical Crystal.

2026-03-07

The Phenomenon of the 40mm Metal Miniature: Evolution of Collectible Sculpture

The culture of miniature sculpture in the countries of the former USSR represents a unique synthesis of military-historical reconstruction, art casting, and modern digital communities.

◆ Knowledge Ark

A decentralised initiative to preserve humanity's most important knowledge across multiple storage media and locations — on Earth and in space.
